title: Functional Storage Downgrade Fix
description: This is a patch that fixes the conditions under which Functional Storage's Iron downgrade can be applied and prevents the item overstack bug.
body:
# Functional Storage Downgrade Fix (MC 1.20.1)

A small patch that fixes an item **overstack** issue in [Functional Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/functional-storage) for Minecraft 1.20.1. This patch fixes the conditions under which the Functional Storage iron downgrade can be applied and prevents the item overstack bug.

## Requirements

*   Minecraft 1.20.1
*   Functional Storage (1.20.1-1.2.10 or later)

## LICENSE

Functional Storage is distributed under the MIT License.  
The original license text can be found in `LICENSE-FunctionalStorage`.

## Disclaimer

This project is an independent compatibility fix and is not affiliated with the original Functional Storage developers.
